overall.description: Game engine footage depicting a first-person walk from a rural dirt path approaching an airport runway, transitioning to the Del Monte Shopping Center parking lot. The clip features clear summer weather and moves from natural airfield surroundings to a commercial retail environment with multiple storefronts.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rural dirt path cutting through tall grasslands under a clear blue sky. The camera walks steadily forward toward a distant airport runway, with an air traffic control tower visible on the right horizon. At approximately 18 seconds, the ground surface transitions from dirt to asphalt as the path meets the runway, before cutting to a completely new location at 24 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: shopping center parking lot with retail storefronts

events.description: camera turns right to follow the line of storefronts along the shopping center

agents.ego_description: walking through the empty shopping center parking lot, passing by various retail buildings and observing the storefronts

entered.detail: white and red brick commercial building with multiple windows and gabled roof
expansive asphalt parking area with faded white parking lines
single-story retail buildings with colorful awnings in green and red
green forested hills visible behind the shopping center

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the Del Monte Shopping Center, showing a large parking lot surrounded by retail buildings. The camera walks past a two-story white and brick building on the left, then turns to follow a row of single-story storefronts featuring colorful green and red awnings. The area is completely devoid of pedestrians or vehicles, with forested hills visible in the background under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a remote rural airfield into a deserted commercial shopping plaza. It begins on a dirt path cutting through tall grasslands under a clear blue sky, moving steadily toward a distant airport runway and an air traffic control tower on the horizon. As the camera advances, the ground surface shifts from dirt to asphalt upon reaching the runway before the environment abruptly transforms into the Del Monte Shopping Center. The scene then expands across a large, empty parking lot, passing a two-story white and brick building on the left before turning to follow a row of single-story storefronts with colorful green and red awnings. Finally, the view opens up to reveal forested hills in the background under the bright midday sun, emphasizing the complete absence of pedestrians and vehicles.
